meta.name: Nepal Skincare App — Content & Blog Database
meta.description: Articles, books, visual library, and 52-week content calendar. Expanded with Swaskin Ayurveda, diet, pollution, and monsoon articles.

articles.title_en: Why Kathmandu Skin Ages Faster: Pollution, Hard Water & What You Can Do
articles.title_ne: काठमाडौंको छाला किन छिटो बुढ्यौलो हुन्छ: प्रदूषण, कडा पानी र समाधान
articles.summary_en: A deep dive into how Kathmandu valley air quality (AQI often 150+), tap water hardness, and UV at 1300m altitude accelerate skin aging — with actionable product and routine fixes.
articles.inspiration_source: Journal of Environmental Dermatology + Nepal EPA reports

articles.title_en: The Dashain Diet and Your Skin: How Festive Eating Affects Acne
articles.title_ne: दशैंको खाना र तपाईंको छाला: चाडपर्वको खानाले मुहासोलाई कसरी असर गर्छ
articles.summary_en: Explains the link between festive high-glycemic foods (sel roti, mutton, alcohol) and post-Dashain breakouts. Includes a practical guide to enjoying festivals without wrecking your skin.
articles.inspiration_source: American Academy of Dermatology (diet-acne link) + local food context

articles.title_en: Glass Skin on a Nepali Budget: 7 Affordable Routines That Actually Work
articles.title_ne: नेपाली बजेटमा ग्लास स्किन: ७ सस्तो तर प्रभावकारी रुटिन
articles.summary_en: A step-by-step guide using products available at New Road, Daiso Nepal, and e-commerce platforms like Sastodeal under NPR 2000 total budget.
articles.inspiration_source: K-beauty principles adapted for South Asian skin tones

articles.title_en: Monsoon Skin Survival Guide for Nepal
articles.summary_en: High humidity (80-90%) from June-September causes sweat-clogged pores, fungal issues, and excess oil. This guide covers lightweight routines, non-comedogenic sunscreens, and anti-fungal tips.

articles.title_en: Haldi (Turmeric) Face Mask: The Science Behind Dadi Aama's Secret
articles.title_ne: बेसार फेस मास्क: दादी आमाको नुस्खाको पछाडिको विज्ञान
articles.summary_en: Breaks down the science of curcumin (anti-inflammatory, antioxidant) and explains which traditional Nepali/Indian kitchen remedies are evidence-backed and which can cause irritation or PIH.

articles.title_en: Sun Protection in Nepal: Why SPF 15 is NOT Enough at High Altitude
articles.title_ne: नेपालमा सनस्क्रिन: उच्च उचाइमा SPF 15 किन पर्याप्त छैन
articles.summary_en: UV radiation increases 10-12% per 1000m altitude. Explains PA+ ratings, broad-spectrum vs UVA-only, and recommends locally available SPF 50+ options under NPR 1500.
articles.inspiration_source: WHO UV index guidelines + altitude dermatology research

articles.title_en: Stress, Board Exams & Breakouts: A Student's Guide to Skin During SEE/+2
articles.title_ne: तनाव, बोर्ड परीक्षा र मुहासो: SEE/+2 को समयमा छालाको हेरचाह
articles.summary_en: Exam cortisol spikes sebum production. Practical 3-minute morning/night routine, diet hacks (avoid masala chips, drink more water), and mindfulness links tailored for Nepali students.
articles.inspiration_source: Psychodermatology research + user survey from app

articles.title_en: Winter Skin in the Hills and Mountains of Nepal
articles.summary_en: Covers extreme dryness at altitude (Pokhara, Mustang, Namche) with focus on rebuilding the skin moisture barrier using locally available oils (mustard, sesame, almond) and budget ceramide creams.
articles.inspiration_source: Cold climate dermatology + Himalayan trekking communities feedback

articles.title_en: Dal Bhat Power: How Nepal's Staple Diet Secretly Helps Your Skin
articles.title_ne: दाल भात पावर: नेपालको मुख्य खाना कसरी तपाईंको छालालाई मद्दत गर्छ
articles.summary_en: Dal is rich in zinc (acne fighter) and B vitamins (skin repair). Rice provides skin-friendly carbs. Shows how to optimize the classic Nepali meal with spinach, ghee, and achar for maximum skin benefits.
articles.inspiration_source: Nutritional dermatology research + Nepal food composition tables

articles.title_en: Retinol for South Asian Skin: What Nobody Tells You About Starting
articles.title_ne: दक्षिण एसियाली छालाको लागि रेटिनोल: शुरु गर्नु अगाडि के थाहा हुनुपर्छ
articles.summary_en: Darker skin tones have higher PIH risk from retinol purging. Explains how to introduce retinol safely, which concentrations to start with (0.025%), and which Nepali/Indian brands to trust.
articles.inspiration_source: Dermatology for darker skin tones (Taylor & Kelly) + community reviews

articles.title_en: Your First Skin Quiz Result Explained: What Each Condition Really Means
articles.title_ne: तपाईंको पहिलो स्किन क्विजको नतिजा: हरेक अवस्थाको अर्थ
articles.summary_en: An in-app article that appears right after users complete the skin quiz. Explains each diagnosis in simple terms with Nepali context, next steps, and which features to use first.

articles.title_en: 10 Nepali Women with Glowing Skin Reveal Their Secrets
articles.title_ne: १० नेपाली महिलाहरूको चम्किलो छाला: तिनीहरूको रहस्य
articles.summary_en: User story-style motivational feature showcasing real app users and their skin journeys. Builds social proof, community, and visual inspiration within the app.

articles.title_en: Why your grandmother's haldi doodh is better than any serum
articles.summary_en: The science behind turmeric milk and how curcumin outperforms many marketed brightening actives for South Asian skin.

articles.title_en: The Kathmandu pollution skin guide: protect against PM2.5
articles.summary_en: A science-backed approach to protecting your skin when the AQI hits 200+. No expensive products needed.

articles.title_en: The Nepali skin diet: what to eat for clear, glowing skin
articles.summary_en: Dal, achar, and ghee — which traditional foods help your skin and which silently cause breakouts?

articles.title_en: Monsoon skin survival guide for Nepal
articles.summary_en: Humidity, fungal breakouts, and sudden acne flares — your complete monsoon skincare reset.

articles.title_en: Niacinamide vs Vitamin C: which does Nepal skin need more?
articles.summary_en: Breaking down the two most popular skincare actives and which addresses our specific climate better.

books.title: The Skincare Bible
books.author: Dr. Anjali Mahto
books.relevance: Written by a South Asian dermatologist — highly relevant for Nepali skin tones and concerns
books.where_to_buy_nepal: Available on Kindle; physical import via Getz Pharma bookstore Kathmandu
books.app_blog_angle: Series of 5 posts summarizing key chapters with Nepal-specific localization

books.title: Skin Cleanse
books.author: Adina Grigore
books.relevance: Minimalist, natural approach — aligns with home remedy culture in Nepal
books.app_blog_angle: Post: What minimalist skincare looks like with Nepali pantry ingredients

books.title: The Little Book of Skin Care
books.author: Charlotte Cho
books.relevance: K-beauty bible — extremely popular among Nepali youth and teens
books.app_blog_angle: Adapted K-beauty routines for Kathmandu climate and budget

books.title: Beautiful Skin Begins Within
books.author: Julie Van Onselen
books.relevance: Diet and gut-skin axis — highly relevant given dal-bhat and spicy food culture
books.app_blog_angle: Monthly diet-skin column using local Nepali food examples

books.title: Ayurveda Skin Care
books.author: Dr. Melanie Sachs
books.relevance: Ayurvedic principles deeply embedded in Nepali/Hindu cultural skincare practices
books.app_blog_angle: Bridging science and tradition: what Ayurveda gets right about skin

visual_library.description: Curated visual themes for use across the app. Source from Unsplash, Pexels free license, or commission local photographer.

glow_up_visuals.description: Close-up of South Asian woman with dewy, lit-from-within skin — morning light
glow_up_visuals.search_keywords: south asian glowing skin natural light

glow_up_visuals.description: Confident South Asian teen/young adult with clear skin, slight smile — natural daylight
glow_up_visuals.search_keywords: clear skin confidence south asian portrait

glow_up_visuals.description: Close-up showing even, smooth brown skin texture — macro photography
glow_up_visuals.search_keywords: even skin tone brown complexion close up

glow_up_visuals.description: South Asian woman touching cheek — bouncy, hydrated skin texture visible
glow_up_visuals.search_keywords: hydrated skin bounce plump south asian

glow_up_visuals.description: Nepali woman outdoors with natural glowing skin — mountains or garden background
Flat-lay of affordable skincare products on traditional Nepali fabric/dhaka print
Split image concept — dull/troubled skin to radiant glowing skin (same person)
glow_up_visuals.search_keywords: before after skin transformation south asian

glow_up_visuals.description: Vibrant Nepali thali with dal, vegetables, fruits — colorful, inviting
glow_up_visuals.search_keywords: nepali thali dal bhat colorful fresh

visual_library.licensing_note: Prefer Unsplash (free commercial use) or Pexels. For authentic Nepali faces, commission local photographers in Kathmandu — budget NPR 5000-15000 per session. Always get signed model release forms.

content_calendar.description: 52-week content calendar. Week 1 = first week of Poush (mid-December) aligned with Nepali skincare needs.
content_calendar.cadence: One major article per week + one short tip post (200 words) per week

weekly_schedule.short_tip: Switch to cream cleanser in winter
Layer a hydrating toner under your moisturizer
Drink warm water with lemon every morning for gut-skin health
Apply mustard oil on dry elbows and heels overnight
Try a rose water mist for instant glow
Add a handful of walnuts to your daily snack for omega-3s
Apply coconut oil before Holi to protect from color chemicals
Start your SPF habit now before summer heat hits
New Year resolution: SPF every single day
Reapply sunscreen every 2 hours in summer
Use a gentle foaming cleanser twice daily in hot weather
Never use retinol and vitamin C in the same routine
Switch to gel moisturizer as humidity rises
10 deep breaths = lower cortisol = fewer breakouts
Keep blotting paper in your bag this monsoon
Exfoliate dead skin cells after monsoon — use a gentle AHA toner
Balance festive eating with extra water and probiotics
A simple 3-day skin detox after Tihar
Never skip moisturizer in winter even if your skin feels oily
Reflect on your skin journey — take a comparison photo today

campaign_list.name: Naya Barsha New Skin
campaign_list.goal: Major feature highlight + new user acquisition

campaign_list.name: Dashain Glow
campaign_list.goal: Highest traffic period — push premium features
